description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of light wood and matte white finishes. The front includes three tall doors, two of which are full-length, while the third is shorter and sits above an open cubby area with hooks and a bench-like surface. The left side panel is finished in a light wood grain, while the right side and doors are a smooth, matte white. The open cubby section provides a convenient space for hanging items or sitting, and the wardrobe stands on small, discrete feet. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a functional layout suitable for urban interiors or entryways. No visible handles or mirrors are present, emphasizing the sleek, handle-less door design.
description: A modern wardrobe with matte white doors, light wood side panels, and an open cubby with hooks and a bench. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the full height of the wardrobe with a light wood grain finish and no visible doors or openings.
description_view_1: The front view displays three matte white doors, an open cubby with hooks, and a bench area, highlighting the wardrobe's main functional features.
description_view_2: The right side view reveals the depth of the wardrobe, a partial view of the open cubby, and the smooth white finish of the side panel.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back panel with a mix of wood and white finishes, and the wardrobe's small feet are visible at the base.
